design_vision: Tile Mountain inspired but elevated. Earthy, tactile, premium yet accessible. We move away from generic SaaS white cards and use a 'Textured Sand' background with crisp, 1px bordered containers. The Order Summary acts as a 'Modern Receipt' – slightly darker sand background to anchor the right side, giving it physical weight. Lively micro-interactions add delight to mundane tasks.

layout_architecture.container: max-w-[1200px] mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-12 lg:py-20
layout_architecture.grid: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 lg:gap-16 items-start

OrderSummary.wrapper: bg-[#F3F0EB] rounded-2xl p-6 lg:p-8 border border-[#E7E5E4] flex flex-col gap-6
OrderSummary.header: flex items-center justify-between border-b border-[#E7E5E4]/60 pb-4
OrderSummary.item_image_wrapper: h-20 w-20 rounded-xl bg-white border border-[#E7E5E4] overflow-hidden shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center
OrderSummary.item_metrics: font-mono text-xs text-[#78716C] bg-white/60 px-2 py-1 rounded-md inline-flex w-fit mt-1 border border-[#E7E5E4]
OrderSummary.stepper_control: flex items-center gap-3 bg-white border border-[#E7E5E4] rounded-lg px-2 py-1 shadow-sm
OrderSummary.grand_total_row: flex justify-between items-end text-[#1C1917] font-bold text-2xl pt-2
OrderSummary.trust_badges_container: flex items-center justify-center gap-3 pt-4 opacity-70 grayscale
OrderSummary.stripe_pay_btn: w-full bg-[#635BFF] hover:bg-[#5249E5] text-white py-4 rounded-xl font-medium text-lg flex items-center justify-center gap-2 transition-all hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-0.5

Progress_and_Upsells.free_delivery_card: bg-white border border-[#E7E5E4] rounded-2xl p-5 mb-6 shadow-sm
Progress_and_Upsells.free_delivery_text: text-sm font-medium text-[#1C1917] flex items-center justify-between mb-3
Progress_and_Upsells.tier_upsell_pill: w-full mt-4 bg-[#FFF9E5] border border-[#FFD100]/30 rounded-xl p-4 flex items-start gap-3 cursor-pointer hover:bg-[#FFF4CC] transition-colors

CheckoutSteps.step_container: bg-white border border-[#E7E5E4] rounded-2xl p-6 lg:p-8 shadow-sm transition-all duration-300
CheckoutSteps.step_number: w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-[#F3F0EB] text-[#1C1917] flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-sm

framer_motion_animations.list_container: variants={{ hidden: { opacity: 0 }, show: { opacity: 1, transition: { staggerChildren: 0.1 } } }}
framer_motion_animations.list_item: variants={{ hidden: { opacity: 0, y: 10 }, show: { opacity: 1, y: 0 }, exit: { opacity: 0, scale: 0.95, height: 0 } }} layout
framer_motion_animations.success_checkmark: initial={{ scale: 0, rotate: -45 }} animate={{ scale: 1, rotate: 0 }} transition={{ type: 'spring', damping: 12 }}

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Parse this JSON. Apply strictly to '/app/frontend/src/pages/shop/TileCheckoutPage.js' and '/app/frontend/src/pages/shop/TileCartPage.js'.
2. Stick strictly to the earthy sand (#F9F8F6, #F3F0EB) and charcoal (#1C1917) palette, alongside the #FFD100 yellow and #635BFF Stripe violet CTA.
3. Use a 12-column grid layout (7 col for main content, 5 col for sticky sidebar) for both pages.
4. VERY IMPORTANT: You must retain ALL 'data-testid' attributes in your generated JSX EXACTLY as listed above.
5. Use Framer Motion (`<motion.div>`) for: progress bar fill width, cart list items (layout transitions), hover scale on stepper +/- buttons.
6. Format tile metrics ('11.52 m² · 8 boxes') using the `item_metrics` classes provided above to make it look structural and technical.
7. Order Summary should be styled like a tactile receipt `bg-[#F3F0EB]` to contrast the page body `bg-[#F9F8F6]`.
8. Preserve the multi-step flow logic in Checkout (Details -> Delivery -> Payment) while upgrading the visual step headers.
9. Do not modify global nav, footer, or any routing logic. Only rewrite the components' internal structural JSX and Tailwind.
